title: Ellis Porter Partners with RSM to Present Webcast on the Future of Global Mobility and Immigration — ELLIS PORTER
content:
On Wednesday, August 19 at 11:00am EST , Ellis Porter will present a webcast on the Future of Global Mobility and Immigration in partnership with the international tax experts at RSM , the leading audit, tax and consulting services firm for the global middle market, and 5th largest accounting firm in the US (6th largest globally). In today’s Global Mobility environment, there is a significant overlap between immigration legal planning and international tax planning for employers with international employees, and the two issues are becoming more intertwined every day. That’s why we’re really excited to collaborate with RSM on this webcast to present a more comprehensive, integrated discussion of immigration and global mobility issues for the benefit of HR Global Mobility and Immigration professionals.

### In the webcast, we’ll discuss strategic tips, creative solutions and best practices for employers navigating global mobility issues in the new normal, including:
• The overall impact of Covid-19 on global mobility programs
• Solutions to address potential tax consequences associated with displaced employees working from unexpected locations
• How to take advantage of IRS tax relief measures
• The current status of global travel restrictions, visa services at Consulates and new immigration policies
• Creative immigration legal strategies to help global employers navigate travel and work visa roadblocks
• The immigration impacts of remote work policies
The webcast will also include an interactive global mobility Q&A.

### Webcast Registration
You can register for the webcast here . If you have a conflict on the day of the webcast, we still encourage you to register so you can access a recording of the webcast at a later date.
